< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Updatable.InstantMessageThreadUpdateV1

This class represents the updatable part of an Instant Message Thread message. InstantMessageThreadId is not possible to update.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
InstantMessageThreadId

The Id of the message thread to update

 integer

None.
UpdateName

Determines if the name should be updated

 boolean

None.
UpdateParticipants

Determines if the list of participants should be updated

 boolean

None.
Name

The new name of the thread

 string

None.
PersonIds

PersonIds to send instant message to. A new thread will be created if the persons don't have an existing thread already. The ToPersonIds or the InstantMessageThreadId need to have a valid value.

 Collection of integer

None.
ToggleEnableDisableReplies

Determines if the option to send to close the conversation should be updated

 boolean

None.
RepliesAreEnabled

Whether students can reply to the conversation or not

 boolean

None.
